weapons.name: Implant Attack
weapons.abilities: Extra Attack(1), Hits automatically wound the target

equipment.name: Acid Maw
equipment.desc: Basic Biomorph. Point costs are paid per unit. The model may re-roll one to wound roll in melee per battle round.

equipment.name: Adrenal Glands
equipment.desc: Basic Biomorph. Point costs are paid per unit. The model gains "Haste(2")".

equipment.name: Enhanced Senses
equipment.desc: Basic Biomorph. Point costs are paid per unit. The model gains the "Acute Senses" ability.

equipment.name: Heightened Reflexes
equipment.desc: Basic Biomorph. Point costs are paid per unit. If the unit has not already activated this turn, it may immediately use up its order and fire at an enemy unit within 18" that is deployed as reinforcement as if it had been given the "Stand & Shoot" order. The attack resolves after the enemy unit has been deployed and before it takes another action.

equipment.name: Pathogenesis
equipment.desc: Basic Biomorph. Point costs are paid per unit. The model adds +3" to all of its ranged weapons.

equipment.name: Relentless Hunger
equipment.desc: Basic Biomorph. Point costs are paid per unit. The model gains +3" for its Consolidation moves.

equipment.name: Toxin Sacs
equipment.desc: Basic Biomorph. Point costs are paid per unit. The model gains +1 Strength and the "Poison(4+)" ability for all melee attacks.

equipment.name: Acid Blood
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model gains the "Retribution(3)" ability.

equipment.name: Extremely Volatile
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model always explodes like a vehicle. The explosion is resolved at Strength 7.

equipment.name: Implant Attack
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model gains the "Implant Attack" weapon.

equipment.name: Infrasonic Roar
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model gains the "Suppression" ability for all ranged attacks made against targets within 12".

equipment.name: Resonance Barb
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The models gains +1 to all tests for manifesting a psychic power.

equipment.name: Symbiote Rippers
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model gains the "Symbiote Rippers" weapon.

equipment.name: Thornback
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model doubles the final combat result for its own army in each melee in which it participates.

equipment.name: Tusked
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model gains +1 additional attack as a Charge bonus.

equipment.name: Warped
equipment.desc: Advanced Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit. The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Endless
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. If the unit is below half its starting strength or is destroyed, it can be removed from the field once per game at the end of the battle round and automatically reappears as a reserve at full starting strength in the next battle round. Additionally, you get one "Spawning pool" token for every started three units with the "Endless" ability. You may set them up after all Infiltrators have been placed during the Deployment phase. They have to be placed at least 12" away from the enemy deployment zone and at least 6" away from any mission objective. Units with the "Endless" ability may enter the game through these tokens when arriving from reserve.

equipment.name: Feeder Tendrils
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model gains the "Prefered Enemy(everything)" ability for itself and any friendly unit in the same melee combat.

equipment.name: Hardened Carapace
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model improves its armor save by +1.

equipment.name: Leaping
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model gains the "Frenzy(6")" ability.

equipment.name: Norn Crown
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model may cast and deny 1 more psychic power per battle round.

equipment.name: Regeneration
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model gains the "Regeneration(1)" ability.

equipment.name: Scuttlers
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model gains the "Vanguard" ability.

equipment.name: Synaptic Node
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model gains the "Fearless" and "Synapse" ability. Only a single unit per army may take this Biomorph.

equipment.name: Winged
equipment.desc: Special Biomorph. Point costs are paid for every model of the unit and vary per datasheet. The model gains +6" Movement as well as the "Anti-Grav" and "Deep Strike" abilities.
